title: Homepage hero content is visible on initial load
description: Verifies the homepage renders the hero section with the person’s identity content visible to the user.

steps.description: Verify element "Hero bio/summary text" is visible
Verify element "Primary hero call-to-action button or link" is visible

title: Homepage metrics strip renders with labeled metric values
description: Verifies the metrics strip is visible and shows multiple metric items with labels and numeric values.

steps.description: Verify element "A metric item label" is visible
Verify element "A metric item value" is visible
Verify element "At least three metric items" is visible

title: Featured Projects section shows exactly 3 project cards
description: Verifies the homepage shows a Featured Projects section with three visible project summary cards.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured Projects section" is visible
Verify element "Featured project card 1" is visible
Verify element "Featured project card 2" is visible
Verify element "Featured project card 3" is visible

title: Each featured project card displays essential summary fields
description: Verifies a featured project card includes a title and short description/summary visible to the user.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured Projects section" is visible
Verify element "Featured project card title" is visible
Verify element "Featured project card description/summary text" is visible
Verify element "Featured project card link or call-to-action" is visible

title: Recent experience preview content is visible on the homepage
description: Verifies the homepage includes a recent experience preview list showing at least one visible item.

steps.description: Verify element "Recent experience section" is visible
Verify element "An experience item" is visible
Verify element "Experience item role/title" is visible
Verify element "Experience item company/organization" is visible

title: Projects page loads and shows all projects by default
description: Verifies the Projects Gallery initially displays all project cards and the All filter is available.

title: All filter shows the full set of projects
description: Verifies clicking All results in seeing all four known projects in the gallery.

title: DATA SCIENCE filter narrows the gallery results
description: Verifies the DATA SCIENCE filter refines the visible project cards and updates the displayed list.

title: RESEARCH filter shows research project(s) and can be reset
description: Verifies the RESEARCH filter applies and the gallery can be reset back to All.

title: EXCEL AUTOMATION filter shows the accounting automation project
description: Verifies the EXCEL AUTOMATION filter makes the accounting automation project visible in the gallery.

title: FULL STACK filter shows the exam analysis system project
description: Verifies the FULL STACK filter makes the exam analysis system project visible in the gallery.

title: Switching filters multiple times keeps the gallery responsive
description: Verifies rapid sequential filter changes update the visible gallery content without getting stuck.

title: Projects gallery remains usable when scrolled on mobile-length pages
description: Verifies filter controls and project cards are still accessible after scrolling through the gallery.

title: Project detail page renders core case study sections for a valid project slug
description: Verifies that a valid project detail page shows the expected core content sections (title, overview, methodology, metrics/findings, tech stack).

steps.description: Verify element "Project title heading" is visible

title: Project metadata (category, duration, read time) is visible on the project detail page
description: Verifies that key project metadata is displayed to the user on the case study page.

steps.description: Verify element "Read time label/value" is visible
Verify element "Project overview summary" is visible

title: Methodology section displays multiple phases/steps
description: Verifies that the methodology section shows a list of phases/steps rather than being empty.

steps.description: Verify element "Methodology phase list" is visible
Verify element "At least one methodology phase item" is visible
Verify element "Methodology phase title" is visible
Verify element "Methodology phase description" is visible

title: Key metrics and findings section displays summarized metrics
description: Verifies that the project shows key metrics/findings content to the user.

steps.description: Verify element "Metrics summary list" is visible
Verify element "At least one metric item" is visible

title: Extended metrics visualization or details are shown (time series) when present
description: Verifies that extended metrics (such as a chart or expanded metric details) are visible on the project detail page when available.

steps.description: Verify element "Extended metrics container" is visible
Verify element "Metrics time series visualization or table" is visible
Verify element "Metrics legend or axis labels" is visible

title: Tech stack section lists technologies used in the project
description: Verifies that the tech stack is presented as a visible list of technologies.

steps.description: Verify element "Tech stack list" is visible
Verify element "At least one technology tag/item" is visible

title: GitHub link is visible and looks like an external project link
description: Verifies that a GitHub link is displayed on the project detail page for a project that provides one.

steps.description: Verify element "External link icon near GitHub link" is visible

title: Non-existent project slug shows a not-found state with a path back to projects gallery
description: Verifies that an invalid project slug results in a clear not-found experience and offers navigation back to the projects list.

steps.description: Verify element "Back to projects" is visible

title: Essays list page loads and displays core essay metadata
description: Verifies the essays list page renders multiple essays and shows title, date, read time, and tags where available.

steps.description: Verify at least one essay title is visible in the list
Verify a date is visible for at least one essay item
Verify a read time value is visible for at least one essay item
Verify at least one tag is visible on an essay item (if tags are shown on the page)

title: Open an essay detail page from the essays list
description: Verifies a user can click an essay from the list and reach the essay detail page with content visible.

steps.description: Verify at least one essay title is visible in the list
Click on the first visible essay title
Verify an article title is visible on the essay detail page
Verify body content text is visible on the essay detail page

title: Essay detail page shows header metadata (title/date/read time)
description: Verifies the essay detail page shows key metadata typically included in the header area.

steps.description: Click on the first visible essay title
Verify an article title is visible on the essay detail page
Verify a date is visible on the essay detail page
Verify a read time value is visible on the essay detail page

title: Essay detail page renders rich content sections (MDX/HTML)
description: Verifies the essay body renders multiple paragraphs/sections, indicating MDX/HTML content is loaded and displayed.

steps.description: Click on the first visible essay title
Verify body content text is visible on the essay detail page
Scroll to the middle of the page
Verify additional body content text is visible below the initial viewport

title: Substack subscribe CTA is visible on the essays list page
description: Verifies the subscribe call-to-action is visible on the essays list page.

steps.description: Verify text "Substack" is visible (if the CTA mentions Substack)

title: Substack subscribe CTA is actionable from the essays list page
description: Verifies clicking the subscribe CTA results in navigation intent (URL change) to a subscribe destination.

title: Essays list gracefully handles empty/low-content state
description: Verifies the essays list page provides visible feedback if no essays are shown (empty state) rather than a broken UI.

steps.description: Verify the essays list area is visible
Verify either at least one essay item is visible or an empty-state message is visible (for example, "No essays" or "Coming soon")

title: Essay navigation back to list is available from detail page (if provided)
description: Verifies users can return to the essays list using an on-page navigation control.

steps.description: Click on the first visible essay title
Verify element "Back" or "All essays" is visible (whichever exists)

title: About page displays communities, beyond-work interests, and skills summary
description: Verifies that the About page renders the key About content sections expected from the About content source.

title: Footer shows social links and contact info on About page
description: Verifies that the footer on the About page includes social links and contact information for reaching out.

title: View Journey timeline default state shows all entries
description: Verifies the Journey page loads and shows the full timeline by default (All filter).

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Verify element "All" filter option is visible
Verify element "Timeline" (list of timeline cards) is visible
Verify at least one "timeline card" is visible

title: Filter Journey timeline to Work entries
description: Verifies selecting the Work filter updates the timeline to show Work entries only.

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Click on "Work" in the Type filter
Verify text "Work" is visible as the selected filter
Verify at least one "timeline card" is visible
Verify text "Research" is not visible within the Type filter selection indicator area

title: Filter Journey timeline to Research entries
description: Verifies selecting the Research filter updates the timeline to show Research entries only.

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Click on "Research" in the Type filter
Verify text "Research" is visible as the selected filter
Verify at least one "timeline card" is visible
Verify element "Timeline" (list of timeline cards) is visible

title: Filter Journey timeline to Volunteer entries
description: Verifies selecting the Volunteer filter updates the timeline to show Volunteer entries only.

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Click on "Volunteer" in the Type filter
Verify text "Volunteer" is visible as the selected filter
Verify at least one "timeline card" is visible
Verify element "Timeline" (list of timeline cards) is visible

title: Switch filters sequentially and confirm timeline updates each time
description: Verifies changing filters multiple times updates the visible timeline cards without needing a page refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Click on "Work" in the Type filter
Verify text "Work" is visible as the selected filter
Click on "Research" in the Type filter
Verify text "Research" is visible as the selected filter
Click on "All" in the Type filter
Verify text "All" is visible as the selected filter

title: Empty state handling when a filter returns no entries
description: Verifies the UI shows a clear empty state message if a selected type has no timeline entries.

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Click on "Volunteer" in the Type filter
Verify text "Volunteer" is visible as the selected filter
Verify element "Timeline" (list of timeline cards) is visible
Verify text "Try a different filter" is visible

title: Timeline card content contains the required fields
description: Verifies each visible timeline card presents role, organization, period, and description.

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Verify at least one "timeline card" is visible
Verify element "Role" text within a timeline card is visible
Verify element "Organization" text within a timeline card is visible
Verify element "Period" text within a timeline card is visible
Verify element "Description" text within a timeline card is visible

title: Invalid type is not available in the UI filter options
description: Verifies the UI prevents selecting an invalid type by only showing the supported filter values.

steps.description: Navigate to the Journey (Career Timeline) page from the site’s main navigation
Verify element "All" filter option is visible
Verify element "Work" filter option is visible
Verify element "Research" filter option is visible
Verify element "Volunteer" filter option is visible
Verify text "InvalidType" is not visible in the Type filter

title: View skills grid with all categories displayed
description: Verifies the skills grid renders and shows the expected category sections and skill badges.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Verify at least one skill badge element is visible within the grid.

title: Filter skills by category: Data & Analytics
description: Verifies selecting the Data & Analytics category shows skills for that category in the grid.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Click on the category control labeled "Data & Analytics".
Verify text "Data & Analytics" is visible as the active/selected category.
Verify the skills list/grid is visible.
Verify at least one skill badge element is visible in the filtered results.
Verify text "Software Engineering" is not visible within the filtered results area.

title: Filter skills by category: Software Engineering
description: Verifies selecting the Software Engineering category shows skills for that category in the grid.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Click on the category control labeled "Software Engineering".
Verify text "Software Engineering" is visible as the active/selected category.
Verify the skills list/grid is visible.
Verify at least one skill badge element is visible in the filtered results.
Verify text "Data & Analytics" is not visible within the filtered results area.

title: Filter skills by category: Modeling & Research
description: Verifies selecting the Modeling & Research category shows skills for that category in the grid.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Click on the category control labeled "Modeling & Research".
Verify text "Modeling & Research" is visible as the active/selected category.
Verify the skills list/grid is visible.
Verify at least one skill badge element is visible in the filtered results.
Verify text "Data & Analytics" is not visible within the filtered results area.

title: Switch categories multiple times without breaking the grid
description: Verifies the grid remains usable when switching categories back and forth.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Click on the category control labeled "Data & Analytics".
Verify text "Data & Analytics" is visible as the active/selected category.
Click on the category control labeled "Software Engineering".
Verify text "Software Engineering" is visible as the active/selected category.
Click on the category control labeled "Modeling & Research".
Verify text "Modeling & Research" is visible as the active/selected category.

title: Proficiency metadata is displayed for a skill (if provided)
description: Verifies that proficiency/level metadata is visible on at least one skill item when present.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Scroll to the skills grid section.
Verify at least one skill card/item element is visible.
Verify text "Proficiency" is visible within a skill item, or a visible level indicator text such as "Beginner", "Intermediate", "Advanced", or "Expert" is present.
Click on a visible skill item to view its details (if the UI supports opening details).
Verify the selected skill name text is visible in the details area/panel (if a details view appears).

title: Graceful handling when skills fail to load (error state)
description: Verifies an error message or fallback content appears if skills cannot be fetched.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Verify either the skills grid becomes visible or an error/fallback message is visible.
Verify text "Unable to load" or "Something went wrong" or "Error" is visible if the grid is not shown.
Verify a retry control (e.g., button labeled "Retry" or "Try again") is visible if an error message is shown.
Click on the retry control if it is visible.
Verify the skills grid is visible after retry, or the error message remains visible (but the page does not crash or go blank).

title: Fallback to static skills payload when available
description: Verifies the UI can display skills from a static fallback source when configured/available.

steps.description: Navigate to the Skills page (the page that contains the Skills Grid).
Verify the skills grid is visible.
Verify at least one skill badge element is visible in the grid.

title: Resume page loads and shows primary PDF download action
description: Verifies the /resume page renders and presents a visible control to download the resume PDF.

title: Resume page provides contact instructions for download issues
description: Verifies the resume page includes visible contact instructions for users who cannot download the PDF.

steps.description: Verify text "If you have trouble" is visible

title: Submit subscription with a valid email from the footer CTA
description: Verifies a user can subscribe using a valid email and sees a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the site home page
Type "user@example.com" into the subscribe email field

title: Subscription validation blocks an invalid email format
description: Verifies subscribing with an invalid email shows a visible validation error and does not show success.

steps.description: Navigate to the site home page
Type "bad-email" into the subscribe email field

title: Recover from invalid subscription attempt and succeed with a valid email
description: Verifies a user can correct an invalid email and successfully subscribe afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to the site home page
Type "bad-email" into the subscribe email field
Type "user@example.com" into the subscribe email field

title: Submit contact form with valid name, email, and message
description: Verifies a user can send a contact message and sees a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the site home page
Type "Test User" into the contact name field
Type "user@example.com" into the contact email field
Type "Hello Richard, this is a test message." into the contact message field

title: Contact form validation blocks invalid email format
description: Verifies the contact form shows a visible error when the email is invalid and does not show success.

steps.description: Navigate to the site home page
Type "Test User" into the contact name field
Type "bad-email" into the contact email field
Type "Testing invalid email validation." into the contact message field
Verify text "Message received" is not visible

title: Contact form validation blocks empty required message
description: Verifies the contact form requires a message and shows a visible error when message is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to the site home page
Type "Test User" into the contact name field
Type "user@example.com" into the contact email field
Verify text "Message is required" is visible

title: Full happy path: subscribe successfully then send a contact message
description: Verifies a user can complete both subscription and contact workflows sequentially in one session and sees success confirmations for both.

steps.description: Navigate to the site home page
Type "user@example.com" into the subscribe email field
Type "Test User" into the contact name field
Type "user@example.com" into the contact email field
Type "Following up after subscribing." into the contact message field
